en: Amber will take the composition, Cher will be pro, Cher, two minutes.
So, okay, like right now, for example, the Hadeans need to come to America.
But some people are all, what about the strain on our resources?
But it's like when I had this garden party for my father's birthday, right?
ko: 하지만 아버지 생신에 정원 파티를 했을 때처럼요,

en: I said RSVP because it was a sit-down dinner.
ko: 저는 앉아서 먹는 저녁식사라 RSVP를 했어요.

en: But people came that, like, did not RSVP.
ko: 그런데 회신도 안 한 사람들이 왔어요.

en: So I was, like, totally bugging.
I had to haul ass to the kitchen, redistribute the food, squish in extra place settings.
But by the end of the day, it was, like, the more, the merrier.
And so if the government could just get to the kitchen, rearrange some things,
ko: 그러니 정부가 부엌에 가서 몇 가지만 좀 재정리하면,

en: we could certainly party with the Hadeans. And in conclusion, may I please remind you
ko: 우린 하데인들과도 충분히 파티할 수 있을 거예요.

en: that it does not say RSVP on the Statue of Liberty.
ko: 자유의 여신상에는 '회신 요망'이라고 적혀 있지 않다는 거예요.

en: Thank you. Thank you very much. Whoo!
